variants: Luna Calderon is a dedicated ornithologist with a passion for avian studies. As a member of the Sunrise Mosaicists Collective, she collaborates with fellow enthusiasts to explore the intricacies of bird life. Under the mentorship of her doctoral advisor, Tatiana Luzhko, Luna has developed her expertise further and gained recognition in her field. Her research is generously supported by the Compassreed Scholars Trust, which provides funding for her ongoing projects. Additionally, Luna holds a Luminara Interpreter Label, showcasing her professional credentials in ornithology.
